title: Burrow V1: OS-isolated sandbox runtime for coding agents
description: Implement Burrow V1 per SPEC.md — local-first, single-user CLI/library that spins up sandboxed workspaces (bwrap on Linux, sandbox-exec on macOS), runs CLI-based coding agents inside them, persists run state in SQLite, streams events, and provides steering via inbox messages. ~3-4k LOC, 12-16 days estimate, 10 implementation phases.

title: Phase 0 — Scaffold the Bun/TypeScript project skeleton
description:

Plan template: feature
Plan approach: Implement V1 in 11 sequential phases (0-10) per SPEC.md §22, totaling ~3-4k LOC over 12-16 focused days. Each phase produces a working slice end-to-end against its scope so we can verify SPEC.md §23 success criteria incrementally.…
